name: getZIP
description: Download one or more files by URL and package them into a ZIP archive. Supply a base_url to preserve the original directory structure inside the archive — each file's path relative to base_url becomes its path inside the ZIP. Returns the filename and public URL of the generated ZIP.

urls.description: Public URLs of the files to include in the ZIP.

base_url.description: Reference base URL used to derive relative paths inside the archive. For example if base_url is 'https://example.com/documents/shared/' and a file URL is 'https://example.com/documents/shared/src/main.js', the file is stored as 'src/main.js' in the ZIP.

filename.description: Desired base name for the ZIP file, e.g. 'tetris-game'. The .zip extension is added automatically. Defaults to 'archive'.

timeoutMs.description: Per-file download timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.
